name: NEUROONE MEDICAL TECHNOLOGIES Corp
summary: PART I Overview We are a medical technology company focused on (i) diagnostic, ablation and deep brain stimulation technology for brain related conditions such as epilepsy and Parkinsons disease; (ii) ablation and stimulation for pain management throughout the body; and (iii) drug delivery including diagnostic and stimulation capabilities.
